状态判定不能依赖它: Status judgment cannot rely on it.
加载知识库列表失败: Failed to load the knowledge base list.
出去的回声，则跳过重建: If the echo is outgoing, skip reconstruction.
优先使用明确、可执行的规则，避免“尽量做好”这类模糊描述: Prioritize clear, executable rules and avoid vague descriptions like 'try to do your best'.
包将自动解压提取: The package will be automatically decompressed and extracted.
删除后不可恢复，已绑定该智能体的历史对话仍保留原始绑定信息: Deletion is irreversible; historical conversations bound to this agent will retain original binding information.
才能提取文本内容: Only then can the text content be extracted.
其中内容会在每次会话中注入到: The content will be injected into each session.
如果有进行中的消息且线程状态显示正在流式处理，添加进行中的对话: If there are ongoing messages and the thread status shows streaming, add the ongoing conversation.
表格，适合处理多工作表数据、公式结果、统计汇总和结构化导出: Table, suitable for handling multi-sheet data, formula results, statistical summaries, and structured export.
缓存到映射里供面板/轨迹定位: Cache into mapping for panel/trail positioning.
设计使用流程、整理依赖与优化技能说明: Design usage process, organize dependencies and optimize skill description

由后端使用智能体配置的模型: Model configured by backend using intelligent agent

中只有最后一个为活跃: Only the last one is active in the middle
